settings.title: Settings
settings.simpleModeDescription: Keep AI responses concise — describe only what features were added or what was fixed, in plain language

languageSelect.footer: You can change this later. No reboot required.

ai.welcomeDescription: Set up the AI model you want to use. Your API key is stored securely in your browser and sent directly to your chosen AI provider.
ai.securityNote: Your API key never leaves your browser. It is stored in your browser's local storage and only sent directly to the AI provider when making requests.
ai.anthropicCorsInfo: Anthropic supports direct browser access. A proxy is only needed if your organization restricts CORS.
ai.apiKeyNotConfiguredDetailed: API key is not configured. Set it up in AI settings to start generating.

error.modelRequired: Please select or enter a model
error.regionRequired: AWS region is required for AWS Bedrock (e.g. us-east-1)

apiKeyInstructions.openai: OpenAI API Key — starts with sk-proj- or sk- (https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)
apiKeyInstructions.anthropic: Anthropic API Key — starts with sk-ant-api03- (https://console.anthropic.com)
apiKeyInstructions.google: Google AI / Gemini API Key — starts with AIza (https://aistudio.google.com)
apiKeyInstructions.amazonBedrock: AWS Bedrock API Key — starts with bedrock-api-key- (AWS Bedrock Console)
apiKeyInstructions.azureOpenAI: Azure OpenAI API Key — 32-char hex key (Azure Portal)
apiKeyInstructions.googleVertex: GCP Vertex AI API Key — starts with AIza (Express mode, GCP Console)

ai.regionDescription: AWS region where your Bedrock models are available (e.g. us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1)
ai.azureEndpointDescription: Your Azure OpenAI endpoint URL (e.g. https://my-resource.openai.azure.com)

env.title: Environment Check
env.description: Check if Node.js and npm are available
env.wingetNotFound: Windows Package Manager (winget) was not found.
env.updateAppInstaller: Update App Installer from Microsoft Store
env.manualInstallFallback: If the Store doesn't open, please install each tool manually from the links below.
env.waitForSetup: Please wait for the setup to complete
env.installRequiredTools: Please install the required tools and try again
env.nodejsRequired: Node.js is required for the app's development server and dependency management.
env.setupConfirmDesc: The following tools will be installed using winget
env.vsBuildToolsWarning: VS Build Tools installation requires approximately 4.5 GB of free space and a stable internet connection. A Wi-Fi connection is recommended.
env.uacDescription: If a Windows confirmation dialog (UAC) appears during installation, click "Yes" to allow it. This is standard Windows behavior to confirm system changes.

chat.title: Chat
chat.aiNotConfigured: AI not set — configure from the toolbar
chat.emptyStatePrompt: Tell me what you want to build, like "Make it a task management app" or "Add dark mode".
chat.emptyStateNoProject: Create a project from "New App" in the toolbar, then start building via chat.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Tell me what app you want to build...
chat.streamEndedWithoutResult: ⚠️ The stream ended but the tool result was not obtained

error.aiNotConfiguredDetailed: ⚠️ AI is not configured. Please configure it from the "{{notConfiguredLabel}}" button in the toolbar.
error.noProjectSelected: ⚠️ No project is selected. Create a project from "{{newAppLabel}}" in the toolbar or select one from app history.
error.apiKeyRequiredDetailed:
⚠️ {{provider}} requires an API key.
Configure it from "{{modelLabel}}" → "API Key Settings" in the toolbar.
error.invalidApiKey: The API key is invalid or not configured. Check it from "API Key Settings" in the toolbar.
error.customEndpointRequired: {{provider}} requires an endpoint URL. Please set a custom endpoint in the provider settings.
error.regionRequired: {{provider}} requires an AWS region (e.g. us-east-1). Please set it in the provider settings.
error.ollamaModelRequired: {{provider}} requires a model name (e.g. {{example}}). Please enter it in the provider settings.
error.checkProviderSettings: Check your {{provider}} settings in the toolbar.
error.checkModelSettings: Check that the model "{{model}}" exists and your API key is valid.
error.checkOllamaConnection: Make sure Ollama is running ({{endpoint}}) and the model "{{model}}" is available.

project.switchingDesc: You can start chatting once the new project is ready.

Expanding the "{{appName}}" template and
starting the dev server
project.preparingGeneric: Expanding template and starting the dev server
project.autoDismiss: This screen will automatically close when ready
project.deleteDisabledActive: Cannot delete the currently open project. Switch to another project first.
project.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
project.createNewDesc: Create a new app from scratch with DeskSpawn.
project.templateReact: Uses React + Vite + Tailwind CSS template
project.templateIndexedDB: Data is automatically saved to IndexedDB (browser built-in DB)
project.templateShare: Export/Import to share apps with others

triage.noUserMessage: No user message found, running single mode

hero.subtitle: Just describe what you want. AI turns your words into a working web app. Everything runs in your browser, and your data stays on your computer. Free to use — you only pay for the AI API calls you make. Or use Ollama for completely free local LLMs.

demo.assistantMessage: Got it! I'll create the following files...

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to bring your ideas to life
features.item1Desc: Just describe your idea, and AI builds it for you automatically. No coding knowledge needed.
features.item2Desc: Your data stays in your browser. It's never sent to any server beyond the AI service you choose.
features.item3Desc: No downloads, no setup. Just open your browser and start creating right away.
features.item4Desc: See your app come to life instantly. Make changes and watch it update in real time.
features.item5Desc: AI generates clean, working code with automatic error checking. Fewer bugs from the start.
features.item6Title: Choose Your AI — Or Go Free
features.item6Desc: Bring your own API key for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more. Or use Ollama for completely free local LLMs — zero API costs.

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.desc: A reasonably capable LLM is recommended. DeskSpawn has been verified to work with models at the GPT-5.4-nano level or above. Lower-capability models may struggle with complex code generation tasks.

cta.title: Ready to build your first app?
cta.subtitle: Just add your API key (or use Ollama for free) and start creating. It only takes a few minutes.

landing.footer: DeskSpawn — Build web apps with AI. No coding required.

preview.title: Preview
preview.selectProject: Select or create a project to preview
preview.firstTimeSetup: This may take a moment for first-time setup
